title: Placeable Goat Horns
description: Placeable goat horns that transmit sound via redstone!
body:
The Goat Horn Block mod is a small mod that allows the goat horn to become placeable; when placed, it is able to transmit sound from one end to another when connected via Redstone in a straight line. A video demonstration has been linked below.

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=xdqmPKg3Q8c
